title: stenophragma thalianum var. pusilla
intro: Stenophragma thalianum var. pusilla, commonly known as the dwarf Stenophragma or miniature Thalia, is a small, terrestrial orchid native to tropical regions. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Stenophragma thalianum var. pusilla are believed to include improved immune function, wound healing, and the treatment of various infections. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential interactions.
